panels: Top-left: H1 objective vs beta with L_min strata and 95% CI.
Top-right: changepoint selection frequency across draws.
Bottom-left: H2 discovery frontier k_hat vs replication threshold.
Bottom-right: H2 estimated FDR vs q by method.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h1_h.takeaway: Consensus remained moderate while FDR-replication tradeoff remained controlled at conservative operating points.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h1_h.uncertainty: Line confidence bands are bootstrap-style 95% intervals from seeded sweeps.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h1_h.variables: beta, L_min, objective value, q, rho0, k_hat, estimated_fdr.

panels: Left: sign-identified fraction over Gamma by gamma-mode.
Right: naive vs robust directional error under stress.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h3.p.takeaway: Bounded-confounding logic keeps theorem mismatch near zero and reduces directional error versus naive attribution.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h3.p.uncertainty: Both panels include 95% confidence intervals over seeded runs.

panels: Top-left: Brier score over eta/lambda sweep.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h4.p.takeaway: Stage-A non-inferiority can be checked directly from transport delta and baseline comparisons; Stage-B remained conditional.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h4.p.uncertainty: Bar/line intervals report 95% confidence bounds across sweep combinations.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_h4.p.variables: eta_fused, lambda_l1, brier, calibration_slope, calibration_intercept, log_loss.

panels: Top-left: learned-weight composite scores for P4 and baselines.
Top-right: worst-case regret margin by weight scheme.
Bottom-left: weight allocation across metric components.
Bottom-right: bootstrap top-rank frequency with 95% CI.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_p4.p.takeaway: Learned max-min weights improved worst-case margin vs fixed/equal schemes while exposing conic impossibility cases when applicable.
paper/figures/iter_1/fig_validation_p4.p.uncertainty: Top-rank stability uses bootstrap 95% CI; bar panels use confidence intervals where available.
